title: Camden Property Trust Announces Second Quarter 2022 Dividend
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Trust Managers of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the “Company”) declared a second quarter cash dividend of $0.94 per share to holders of record as of June 30, 2022 of its Common Shares of Beneficial Interest. The dividend is to be paid on July 15, 2022. title: Camden Property Trust Announces Participation in Nareit's REITweek 2022 Investor Conference and Provides Second Quarter 2022 Operating Update
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT) (the “Company”) announced today that it will participate in Nareit’s REITweek 2022 Investor Conference which is being held June 7-9, 2022. The Company also provided operating statistics for second quarter 2022 as detailed below. Same Property Occupancy 1Q22 April 2022 May 2022 Occupancy 97.1% 96.9% 96.9% Same Property New Lease and Renewal Data – Date Signed(1)(2) 1Q22(2) April 2022 May 2022 New Lease Rates 15.8% 14.9% 17.5% Renewal Rates 13.2% 14.3% 14.5% Blended Rates 14.4% 14.6% 15.9% Same Property New Lease and Renewal Data – Date Effective(3)(4) 1Q22(4) April 2022 May 2022 New Lease Rates 16.1% 14.6% 15.8% Renewal Rates 14.1% 13.2% 13.0% Blended Rates 15.1% 13.9% 14.3% (1) Average change in same property new lease and renewal rates vs. expiring lease rates when signed. (2) Data represents average monthly leases effective during the period. (3) Average change in same property new lease and renewal rates vs. expiring lease rates when effective. (4) Data represents average monthly leases signed during the period. Camden’s complete investor presentation is available in the Investors section of the Company’s website at camdenliving.com. Camden Property Trust, an S&P 500 Company, is a real estate company primarily engaged in the ownership, management, development, redevelopment, acquisition, and construction of multifamily apartment communities. Camden owns interests in and operates 170 properties containing 58,055 apartment homes across the United States. Upon completion of 5 properties currently under development, the Company’s portfolio will increase to 59,894 apartment homes in 175 properties. Camden has been recognized as one of the 100 Best Companies to Work For® by FORTUNE magazine for 15 consecutive years, most recently ranking #26. For additional information, please contact Camden’s Investor Relations Department at (713) 354-2787 or access our website at camdenliving.com.

title: 3 Top Stocks From a Thriving Residential REIT Industry
